name: Create Project Form
summary: Frontend modal form for creating a new project with name, path, and description fields
goals: Collect project creation details with real-time validation
Provide clear error messages for invalid inputs

specDetail.description: A modal form component that collects project name, path, and optional description. Validates inputs in real-time and submits to the create project API endpoint.

parameters.name: projectName
parameters.description: Name for the new project (required, 1-100 chars)

parameters.name: projectPath
parameters.description: File system path for the project directory (required)

parameters.name: onSuccess
parameters.description: Callback invoked after successful project creation

constraints: Project name must be unique across existing projects
Path must be a valid filesystem path and not already in use
Form must disable submit button until all required fields pass validation

acceptanceCriteria.given: the create project modal is open
acceptanceCriteria.when: the user fills in a valid name and path and submits
acceptanceCriteria.then: the project is created and the modal closes with a success notification

syncMeta.baseCommitMessage: docs(sync-specs): implement leaf determination redesign with frontend/backend criteria
